Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Algeria.notes: Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days..

Argentina.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Argentina under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Armenia.notes: May apply for a visa on arrival only if holding a valid visa or valid permanent resident permit (resident card) issued by Australia, Belarus, Canada, Gulf Cooperation Council countries, Japan, New Zealand, Russia, Singapore, South Korea, European Union / Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or United States.

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Azerbaijan.notes: Visa on Arrival for holders of a valid GCC state residence permit.

Bangladesh.notes: Only Available if traveling from a country where there is no Bangladeshi Embassy / High Commission / Consulate..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR)..

Bhutan.notes: Visa fee is 40 USD per person and visa application may be processed within 5 business days with duration of stay of 90 days.. The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Brazil.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Brazil under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Canada.notes: Visa not required if holding a Green Card from the U.S..

Chile.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card, although Colombians need to hold a visa prior to travel if they want to reside and work in Chile..

China.notes: 24-hour visa-free transit is available at most international airports for travellers in transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong SAR, China, Macau SAR, China, and Taiwan (Province of China) ) within 24 hours, if they do not leave the airport. Travellers who need to leave the airport may obtain a temporary entry permit from immigration... 5-day Visa on Arrival (port visa) for Shenzhen if arriving at designated ports of entry from Hong Kong SAR, China by land or sea, for stays within Shenzhen.. 3-day Visa on Arrival (port visa) if arriving in Zhuhai or Xiamen at designated ports of entry, for stays within the respective city.. 15-day visa-free entry for cruise ship passengers in tour groups, if arriving at any cruise port along China's coastline, including but not limited to Tianjin; Dalian; Shanghai; Lianyungang; Wenzhou; Zhoushan; Xiamen; Qingdao; Guangzhou; Shenzhen; Beihai; Haikou; Sanya. May further travel inland to all regions of coastal provinces (and equivalents) and Beijing.. May apply for a port visa on arrival if travelling for an urgent, qualified reason. Prior clearance for port visa is highly recommended or may be denied boarding by airlines..

Costa Rica.notes: No visa required if holding a Multiple Entry Visa for the United States, Canada.. May transit without visa if transit is through San José Airport and for no longer than 12 hours..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ecuador.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Ecuador under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Egypt.notes: Visa on arrival costs 30 USD for Single entry visa (Tourism)..

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Gambia.notes: An entry clearance must be obtained from the Gambian Immigration prior to travel..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Haiti.notes: No visa required if holding a United States Visa..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Iran.notes: Passengers can obtain an e-visa before departure. A printed confirmation is required. Applications with status waiting for verification are not accepted. A hard copy of the grant notice must be presented at the visa-on-arrival counter..

Ireland.notes: Visa exemption for holders of a valid short-stay visa issued by the United Kingdom, provided they have first entered the United Kingdom, travel directly to Ireland, and have been granted a stay of 180 days in the United Kingdom; permitted stay is up to 90 days or until the end of the United Kingdom stay, whichever is shorter..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Japan.notes: Visa requirement effective on 1 February 2004.. Holders of a residence permit in Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, India, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, Taiwan (Province of China), United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States. can apply for a single entry e-visa individually. The duration of stay for these jurisdictions is up to 90 days (unless otherwise noted). e-Visa holder must arrive in Japan by air..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ).

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

South Korea.notes: The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval..

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa available via official portal. A printed confirmation is required and can be verified using the Kuwait Visa app..

Kyrgyzstan.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa is available for tourism only..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: May transit without visa if transit is through Auckland Airport and for no longer than 24 hours, subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

Nicaragua.notes: Visa exemption for nationals born in the Raizal territories of the Archipelago of San Andrés, Providencia and Santa Catalina, for stays of up to 90 days.. Visa exemption for passengers whose place of birth is listed as El Salvador..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category..

Paraguay.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Paraguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Peru.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Peru under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Visa on arrival available for holders of a valid visa issued by the United States, the United Kingdom, or a Schengen Member State, for stays of up to 90 days within a 12-month period, provided the visa has been used at least once and bears an entry stamp of the issuing country..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Turkmenistan.notes: When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry..

United States.notes: Certain Colombian Government officials may be denied entry. Colombian citizens with valid U.S. visas may enter the United States with enhanced scrutiny..

Uruguay.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Colombian identity card.. Colombians can live and work legally in Uruguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Vietnam.notes: e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry..

Yemen.notes: Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Armenia.notes: May apply for a visa on arrival only if holding a valid visa or valid permanent resident permit (resident card) issued by Australia, Belarus, Canada, Gulf Cooperation Council countries, Japan, New Zealand, Russia, Singapore, South Korea, European Union / Schengen Area member states, United Kingdom or United States.
